# hetzner-robot_failover (Data Source)

Reads a Hetzner failover IP's current routing (`GET /failover/{ip}`).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner-robot_failover" "vip" {
  failover_ip = "1.2.3.4"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `failover_ip` (String) The failover IP address

### Read-Only

- `active_server_ip` (String) IP of the server the failover IP routes to
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `netmask` (String) Failover netmask
- `server_ip` (String) IP of the server the failover IP belongs to
- `server_number` (Number) Number of the server the failover IP belongs to
